question: Find the mean SumProfL across all OOPR records.
gold_sql: select year(CreateDate) yearCreated, avg(SumProfL) avgLocProfit from OOPR group by year(CreateDate)

question: What are the initials of observers who logged events relating to cover board observations? Include only one row per initials.
gold_sql: select distinct o.ObsInits from Observer_LU o join tlinkObservers tlo on o.ObsInits = tlo.ObsInits join tblEvents e on tlo.EventID = e.EventID join tblFieldDataCoverBoard cb on e.EventID = cb.EventID

question: Show the annual regents exam percent of LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL students at each level from 1 to 5 for the Regents Common Core Algebra I subject taken in 2022. Include the subgroup name, number of students tested, and all of the appropriate percent level score columns.
gold_sql: select SUBGROUP_NAME, tested, PER_LEVEL1, PER_LEVEL2, PER_LEVEL3, PER_LEVEL4, PER_LEVEL5 from [Annual_Regents_Exams] where ENTITY_NAME like '%LONGWOOD HIGH SCHOOL%' 	and year = 2022 	and subject = 'Regents Common Core Algebra I'

question: Find the maximum IntrsStat in RCT2?
what is the average air temperature for each weather type for herpetological survey events?
gold_sql: select weather, avg(airtemp) avgAirTemp  from tblEventDataHerps group by weather

question: Show the average air temperature on cloudy days that correspond to cover board  data where the board material is wood at the site with id 30CB2
gold_sql: select avg(AirTemp) as avgTemp  from tblFieldDataCoverBoard cb join tblEventDataHerps ev on cb.EventID = ev.EventID join tblLocations l on cb.LocationID = l.LocationID where Type = 'Metal' and SiteId = '30CB2' and weather = 'cloudy'

question: Filter tbl_Saplings records and return DClass3.

question: Count tbl_WitnessTrees entries grouped by tlu_PlantSpecies identifier.

question: What is the marital status, home street, home block, home zip code, and home state of the employee with the last name Bridi?

gold_sql: select rate, grad_rate from [ACC_HS_Participation_Rate] p join [ACC_HS_Graduation_Rate] g  	on p.ENTITY_CD = g.ENTITY_CD  	and p.SUBGROUP_NAME = g.SUBGROUP_NAME  	and p.YEAR = g.YEAR  	and p.ENTITY_NAME = g.ENTITY_NAME 	and p.INSTITUTION_ID = g.INSTITUTION_ID where p.ENTITY_NAME = 'Brooklyn Collegiate' and p.SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' and p.year = 2022

question: Show the make, model, manufacture year, and number of ignition cycles of all vehicles with fewer than 200 ignition cycles registered in the event data recorder at the time of crash. Display them by model year older, with the newest models at the top.
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT MAKE, MODEL, MODELYEAR, IGCYCRASH  FROM EDREVENT E JOIN VPICDECODE V ON E.CASEID = V.CASEID AND E.VEHNO = V.VEHNO WHERE IGCYCRASH < 200 AND IGCYCRASH > 0 ORDER BY MODELYEAR DESC

question: Display event notes and location IDs from events that started on August 5th, 2011

question: per vehicle, show the road speed limit, the highest speed the vehicle was recorded by the event data recorder, and how much higher or lower than the speed limit the vehicle was traveling. Limit travel speed and speedlimit to values less than 300 kph.

question: Get all the description and expected costs of project management stages with start dates before october 20th, 2021.
gold_sql: select DSCRIPTION, EXPCOSTS from PMG1 where year < '2021-10-20'

question: Find every unique CASEID across OCC records.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASEID) DEATHCOUNT FROM OCC WHERE FETALMORT = 1

question: Show me length and midpoint diameter of dead wood in the decay stage that has 'log is flat' in the description?
gold_sql: select length, mpd from tbl_Deadwood dw join tlu_DecayStage dc on dw.Decay = dc.DecayStage_ID where DecayStage_Descr like '%log is flat%'

question: What are the names of the sites on each island?
gold_sql: select distinct Island, Site_name from tbl_locations join tbl_sites on tbl_locations.site_id = tbl_sites.site_id

question: Show OGAR records where SubType is set, and return ItmsGrpCod.
What is the average diamater of overstory of the montana species observed in events 15 and 16
gold_sql: select avg(DBH) avgDiameter from tbl_events e join tbl_Overstory o on e.Event_ID = o.Event_ID join tlu_PlantSpecies s on o.SpCode = s.SpeciesCode where species = 'montana' 	and e.Event_ID in (15, 16)

question: Get the account balance of the business partner with the payment method code 'Incoming BT' and a currency type that is either 'EUR' or 'CAN'
gold_sql: select Balance  from OCRD where Currency in ('EUR', 'CAN') and OCRD.PymCode = 'Incoming BT'

question: Retrieve LocationID, PointID, Recapture by linking tblLocationsPoints to tblFieldDataCoverBoard with a filter applied.
gold_sql: select PointID, SnakeID, [Board_#], UTMX, UTMY from tblFieldDataCoverBoard cb join tblLocations l on cb.LocationID = l.LocationID join tblLocationsPoints lp on l.LocationID = lp.LocationID where Recapture = 'new' and siteid = '18CB1'

question: For the event at the highest elevation recorded on July 28 2009, show the light index, evergreen coverage, litter coverage, vegetation height, and elevation
gold_sql: select top 1 LightIndex, Evergreen, Litter, VegHeight, Elevation from tbl_MicroHabitat m join tbl_Events e on m.Event_ID = e.Event_ID join tbl_Locations l on e.Location_ID = l.Location_ID where year(Start_Date) = 2009 and month(Start_Date) = 7 and day(Start_Date) = 28 order by Elevation desc

question: Find the 2022 federal expenditure per student at the public high school with the highest english language learner count in the All Students sub group in their english language program? Include the school name, language learner count, and federal expenditure per student in the result.
gold_sql: select top 1 el.ENTITY_NAME, ELL_COUNT, PER_FED_STATE_LOCAL_EXP from [ACC_HS_ELP] el join [Expenditures_per_Pupil] ex  	on el.ENTITY_CD = ex.ENTITY_CD  	and el.year = ex.year where SUBGROUP_NAME = 'All Students' 	and ELL_COUNT <> 's' 	and ex.YEAR = 2022 	and el.entity_cd in ( 		select entity_cd 		from [Institution_Grouping] 		where GROUP_NAME = 'public school district' 	) order by cast(ELL_COUNT as float) desc

question: List HeaInsType, HeaInsName, lastName from every OHEM record.
gold_sql: select empID, lastName, HeaInsName, HeaInsCode, HeaInsType from OHEM

question: Show the ecology notes, coordinate units, coordinate system, and datum for the location on plot A14_1
gold_sql: select Eco_notes, coord_units, Coord_system, datum from tbl_locations where Plot_ID = 'A14_1'

question: Show what is the sum of journal entry debits and sum of journal entry credits due in 2021? and what is the project code and name of the projects valid after 2020?, joining through related tables.
Find the highest ENTITY_CD in ACC_EM_Chronic_Absenteeism.
gold_sql: select a.entity_name, subgroup_name, enrollment from [ACC_EM_Chronic_Absenteeism] a join [Institution_Grouping] g on a.ENTITY_CD = g.ENTITY_CD where cast(absent_rate as float) = ( 	select max(cast(absent_rate as float))  	from [ACC_EM_Chronic_Absenteeism]  	where absent_rate <> 's' 	and year = 2022 	) 	and absent_rate <> 's' 	and year = 2022 	and group_name = 'public school'

question: What are the Credit, Debit, DueDate in JDT1? Ignore OAGS entirely.

question: Filter and combine HTM1 and OHEM records, returning empID, teamID, CPF.

question: Display description and expected costs of project management stages with start dates before october 20th, 2021.

question: What is the number of vehicles had A pillar damage?

question: What are the the number of crashes by vehicle make from most to least

question: List first recommended front and rear tire sizes and pressure levels for all of the Honda Civics manufactured before 2012 in the dataset.

question: Retrieve top OpenDate value from OOPR.

question: For each card associated with a sales opportunity, Show the carde name, the sum of the real total amount (both local and system), the sum of the real closing gross profit (local and system), and the average closing percentage.

question: Retrieve Type, LocationID, SiteID by linking tblFieldDataCoverBoard to tblLocations with a filter applied.

question: What is the number of of each tree species have tree tags at locations abobe 4000 feet? Show the counts by genus and common species name.

question: Show the event notes and location Names from events that started on August 5th, 2011
gold_sql: select Event_Notes, Loc_Name from tbl_Event_Details d join tbl_Events e on e.Event_ID = d.Event_ID join tbl_Locations l on e.Location_ID = l.Location_ID where DAY(Start_Date) = 5 	and MONTH(Start_Date) = 8 	and YEAR(Start_Date) = 2011

question: Show Lat_final, Alternate_Name, Transect_Type by combining tbl_Locations and tbl_Sites.
gold_sql: select island, site_name, Loc_Name, transect, transect_type, Station, lat_final, te.event_id, last_name, event_notes, family, Scientific_Name, Common_Name, Alternate_Name from tbl_locations tl join tbl_sites ts on tl.Site_ID = ts.Site_ID join tbl_transect tr on tr.Location_ID = tl.Location_ID join tbl_stations st on st.Transect_ID = tr.Transect_ID join tbl_events te on te.station_id = st.station_id join xref_Event_Contacts ec on ec.Event_ID = te.Event_ID join tlu_Contacts con on ec.Contact_ID = con.Contact_ID join tbl_Observations obs on te.Event_ID = obs.Event_ID join tlu_species spc on obs.Species_ID = spc.Species_ID join xref_Species_Alternate_Names spc_alt on spc.Species_ID = spc_alt.Species_ID

question: List vehicles by make and model and the count of the vehicles that had child car seats; Provide a separate count of the count of of these vehicles had distracted drivers.

question: Make a list of tire models and the number of vehicles with those tires installed where tire damage was observed on at least one tire, as indicated by category values other than 0. Display them from most to least common models. Do not include the unknown damage category value 9.
gold_sql: SELECT TIREMODEL, COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(T.CASEID, T.VEHNO)) VEHCOUNT FROM TIRE T LEFT JOIN TIREDAMAGE TD ON T.CASEID = TD.CASEID AND T.VEHNO = TD.VEHNO WHERE DAMAGE > 0 AND DAMAGE <> 9 GROUP BY TIREMODEL ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(T.CASEID, T.VEHNO)) DESC

question: What are the highest speed recorded by the event data recorder for each case for cases where at least one vehicle exceeded 160 (but no more than 300). Include the case id, vehicle make and model. Sort from fastest to slowest.
gold_sql: SELECT PR.CASEID, MAKE, MODEL, MAX(PVALUE) MAXSPEED  FROM EDRPRECRASH PR JOIN VPICDECODE V ON PR.CASEID = V.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = PR.VEHNO WHERE PCODE = 1010 AND PVALUE > 160 AND PVALUE < 300 GROUP BY PR.CASEID, PR.VEHNO, MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY MAX(PVALUE) DESC

question: What RECRRPRESS1, Model, RECFRONT1 data is available when TIREPLAC and VPICDECODE are joined on a criterion?
gold_sql: SELECT RECFRONT1, RECREAR1, RECFRPRESS1, RECRRPRESS1 FROM VPICDECODE V JOIN TIREPLAC T ON V.CASEID = T.CASEID  AND V.VEHNO = T.VEHNO WHERE MAKE = 'HONDA' AND MODEL = 'CIVIC' AND MODELYEAR < 2012

question: For each vehicle, show the road speed limit, the highest speed the vehicle was recorded by the event data recorder, and how much higher or lower than the speed limit the vehicle was traveling. Limit travel speed and speedlimit to values less than 300 kph.
gold_sql: SELECT SPEEDLIMIT, MAXSPEED, MAXSPEED - SPEEDLIMIT DIFF FROM GV JOIN ( 	SELECT CASEID, VEHNO, MAX(PVALUE) MAXSPEED FROM EDRPRECRASH 	WHERE PCODE = 1010 AND PVALUE < 300 	GROUP BY CASEID, VEHNO ) S ON GV.CASEID = S.CASEID AND GV.VEHNO = S.VEHNO WHERE SPEEDLIMIT < 300

question: Create a list of species sightings at each station. question: Find the highest Model in EDRPRECRASH.
gold_sql: SELECT PR.CASEID, MAKE, MODEL, MAX(PVALUE) MAXSPEED  FROM EDRPRECRASH PR JOIN VPICDECODE V ON PR.CASEID = V.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = PR.VEHNO WHERE PCODE = 1010 AND PVALUE > 160 AND PVALUE < 300 GROUP BY PR.CASEID, PR.VEHNO, MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY MAX(PVALUE) DESC

question: For each canopy position name, show how many overstory were classified for each position for the species with the common name 'Red Maple'
gold_sql: select CanPos_Name, count(*) OverstoryCount from tlu_Can_Pos c join tbl_Overstory o on c.CanPos_Num = o.CanPos join tlu_PlantSpecies s on s.SpeciesCode = o.SpCode where CommonName = 'Red maple' group by CanPos_Name

question: What is the useful life, remaining life, and remaining day parameters for the item that uses depreciation area 'GAAP'?
gold_sql: select UsefulLife, RemainLife, RemainDays from ITM7 where DprArea = 'GAAP'

question: Retrieve AirTemp, Weather from tblEventDataHerps. The tluProject table is not relevant.
Show me the how many queries does the dashboard entry with code DAB002 have?
gold_sql: select count(*) queryCount from ODAB join DAB1 on ODAB.AbsEntry = DAB1.DsbEntry where DashbdCode = 'DAB002'

question: what is the average air temperature for each weather type for herpetological survey events?
gold_sql: select weather, avg(airtemp) avgAirTemp  from tblEventDataHerps group by weather

question: Which vehicle make with more than 5 vehicles in the database has the highest number of distracted drivers in proportion to the total number of the make and model in the data?
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, COUNT(*) AS VEHICLE_COUNT, COUNT(DISTRACTN) AS DISTRACT_COUNT, 	CAST(COUNT(DISTRACTN) AS FLOAT) / CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) AS PROP_DISTRACT FROM VPICDECODE V LEFT JOIN DISTRACT D ON V.CASEID = D.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = D.VEHNO GROUP BY MAKE HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY PROP_DISTRACT DESC

question: Filter OCTR records and return Renewal, CstmrName, ContractID.
gold_sql: select ContractID, Renewal from OCTR where CstmrName = 'Maxi-Teq'

question: What are the weather conditions (cloud cover, rain, wind, and gusts) for events entered by Cari Squibb and updated by Seth Judge?
gold_sql: select cloud, rain, wind, gust  from tbl_events e join tbl_Event_Details ed on e.Event_ID = ed.Event_ID where updated_by = 'Seth Judge' and entered_by = 'Cari Squibb'

question: From tbl_Locations only (not tsys_Bug_Reports), return Directions, Location_ID, Location_ID.

question: Find event notes and location IDs from events that started on August 5th, 2011

question: Create a list of species sightings at each station. Include the island, site name, location name, transect and transect type, station, the station's latitude, the event id of the observations, the last names of those who observed as well as their notes, the family, scientific name, common name, and alternate name of each bird observed.
gold_sql: select island, site_name, Loc_Name, transect, transect_type, Station, lat_final, te.event_id, last_name, event_notes, family, Scientific_Name, Common_Name, Alternate_Name from tbl_locations tl join tbl_sites ts on tl.Site_ID = ts.Site_ID join tbl_transect tr on tr.Location_ID = tl.Location_ID join tbl_stations st on st.Transect_ID = tr.Transect_ID join tbl_events te on te.station_id = st.station_id join xref_Event_Contacts ec on ec.Event_ID = te.Event_ID join tlu_Contacts con on ec.Contact_ID = con.Contact_ID join tbl_Observations obs on te.Event_ID = obs.Event_ID join tlu_species spc on obs.Species_ID = spc.Species_ID join xref_Species_Alternate_Names spc_alt on spc.Species_ID = spc_alt.Species_ID

question: List WizardId for SOI2 entries where a BPLId.
Display all the ThreatLevl for each entry in OPR3.
Return highest Peer value in HEM5.
Retrieve StatusOfE, StatusOfP, StreetNoH from OHEM. The OIDT table is not relevant.
What is the decay stage description for the decay stage associated with the lowest recorded midpoint diameter (in meters)?
gold_sql: select DecayStage_Descr from tlu_DecayStage ds where ds.DecayStage_ID in ( 	select top 1 decay 	from tbl_Deadwood 	order by MPD asc )

question: Count the number of contacts are there from each organization?
gold_sql: select organization, count(*) person_count from tlu_contacts group by organization

question: Retrieve QtyPerPack, ItemName, Width1 by linking ITM4 to OITM with a filter applied.
gold_sql: select height1, width1, length1, volume from ITM4 join OITM on ITM4.ItemCode = OITM.ItemCode where itemname = 'Printer Paper A4 White'       and QtyPerPack = 24

question: What is the position title, city, state, and zip code, of the contact with the first name Ivan and the last name C?
gold_sql: select Position_Title, City, State_Code, Zip_Code from tlu_Contacts where First_Name = 'Ivan' and Last_Name = 'C'

question: Which EDRPRECRASH entry has the largest Model?
gold_sql: SELECT PR.CASEID, MAKE, MODEL, MAX(PVALUE) MAXSPEED  FROM EDRPRECRASH PR JOIN VPICDECODE V ON PR.CASEID = V.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = PR.VEHNO WHERE PCODE = 1010 AND PVALUE > 160 AND PVALUE < 300 GROUP BY PR.CASEID, PR.VEHNO, MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY MAX(PVALUE) DESC

question: Return all barcodes for the item named 'Printer Paper A4 White' with unit of measurement entries that are either 3 or 4?
gold_sql: select BcdCode  from OITM join OBCD on OITM.ItemCode = OBCD.ItemCode where ItemName =  'Printer Paper A4 White'       and UomEntry in (3, 4)

question: How many INJURY records exist for each REGION?
gold_sql: SELECT REGION, COUNT(*) INJCOUNT FROM INJURY GROUP BY REGION

question: What are the LineID for RCT1 entries that have a CountryCod.

question: What is the distribution of GV entries across MODELYR values?

question: List vehicles by make and model and the count of the vehicles that had child car seats; Provide a separate count of how many of these vehicles had distracted drivers.
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, MODEL, COUNT(*) AS VEHICLE_COUNT, COUNT(DISTRACTN) AS DISTRACTION_COUNT FROM VPICDECODE V JOIN CHILDSEAT C ON V.CASEID = C.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = C.VEHNO  LEFT JOIN DISTRACT D ON D.CASEID = V.CASEID AND D.VEHNO = V.VEHNO GROUP BY MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY DISTRACTION_COUNT DESC

question: How many events does each station have? Show them in the descending order of event counts. Include the station name and the event count in the output.
gold_sql: select station, count(*) as event_count from tbl_stations ts join tbl_events te on ts.station_id = te.station_id group by ts.station order by event_count desc

question: Show the maximum speed recorded by the event data recorder for each case for cases where at least one vehicle exceeded 160 (but no more than 300). Include the case id, vehicle make and model. Sort from fastest to slowest.
gold_sql: SELECT PR.CASEID, MAKE, MODEL, MAX(PVALUE) MAXSPEED  FROM EDRPRECRASH PR JOIN VPICDECODE V ON PR.CASEID = V.CASEID AND V.VEHNO = PR.VEHNO WHERE PCODE = 1010 AND PVALUE > 160 AND PVALUE < 300 GROUP BY PR.CASEID, PR.VEHNO, MAKE, MODEL ORDER BY MAX(PVALUE) DESC

question: What are the events where both nested subplots and decayed logs were observed. Include the number of decayed logs, and the number of nested subplots were observed.
gold_sql: SELECT e.Event_ID, Deadwood_Count, Nest_Count  FROM tbl_Events AS e JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Deadwood_Count     FROM tbl_Deadwood     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS dw ON e.Event_ID = dw.Event_ID JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Nest_Count     FROM tbl_Nests     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS ne ON e.Event_ID = ne.Event_ID order by Deadwood_Count desc

question: Count DISTRACT entries grouped by VPICDECODE identifier.

question: What is the total number of plant species have the term 'native' in their notes? Show a count of these species by their genus. Only include the five highest results.

question: Show a count of TIREDAMAGE rows for every TIRE.

question: Create a list of species sightings at each station. question: Get total occupant count and the mortality count by belt use category. A mortality occured (was fatal) indicated by lookup code 1.

question: Show a count of tbl_Deadwood rows for every tbl_Events.
gold_sql: SELECT e.Event_ID, Deadwood_Count, Nest_Count  FROM tbl_Events AS e JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Deadwood_Count     FROM tbl_Deadwood     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS dw ON e.Event_ID = dw.Event_ID JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Nest_Count     FROM tbl_Nests     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS ne ON e.Event_ID = ne.Event_ID order by Deadwood_Count desc

question: List the number of crashes by vehicle make from most to least. Show how many of these crashes resulted in a fire. Calculate the proportion of total crashes by make to crashes with a fire
gold_sql: SELECT MAKE, COUNT(*) AS CASE_COUNT, SUM(FIRE) AS FIRE_COUNT, (CAST(SUM(FIRE) AS FLOAT)/ CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT)) AS FIRE_PROPORTION FROM VPICDECODE VD 	JOIN FIRE F ON F.CASEID = VD.CASEID AND F.VEHNO = VD.VEHNO GROUP BY MAKE ORDER BY FIRE_PROPORTION DESC

question: Show the make, model, manufacture year, and number of ignition cycles of all vehicles with fewer than 200 ignition cycles registered in the event data recorder at the time of crash. Display them by model year older, with the newest models at the top.

question: Return the mean total time from the time an accident occurs to the time that emergency services depart the scene of an accident? Exclude values greater than 1600.

question: Get bank details, to include bank code, country, account number, branch, and city, for the business partner with the card name Microchips

question: Show me the events where both nested subplots and decayed logs were observed. Include the number of decayed logs, and the number of nested subplots were observed.
gold_sql: SELECT e.Event_ID, Deadwood_Count, Nest_Count  FROM tbl_Events AS e JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Deadwood_Count     FROM tbl_Deadwood     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS dw ON e.Event_ID = dw.Event_ID JOIN (     SELECT Event_ID, COUNT(*) AS Nest_Count     FROM tbl_Nests     GROUP BY Event_ID ) AS ne ON e.Event_ID = ne.Event_ID order by Deadwood_Count desc

question: Get the widest document width for documents where the grid size of 10?

question: Return all ContractID, CstmrName, Renewal in OCTR? Ignore ACT1 entirely.

question: What is the average diamater of overstory of the montana species observed in events 15 and 16
gold_sql: select avg(DBH) avgDiameter from tbl_events e join tbl_Overstory o on e.Event_ID = o.Event_ID join tlu_PlantSpecies s on o.SpCode = s.SpeciesCode where species = 'montana' 	and e.Event_ID in (15, 16)

question: Filter and combine tlu_PlantSpecies and tbl_Overstory records, returning CommonName, SpCode, TreeTag.
gold_sql: select distinct genus, species, CommonName from tlu_PlantSpecies sp join tbl_Overstory os on sp.SpeciesCode = os.SpCode join tbl_Tree_Tags tt on tt.Tree_Tag_ID = os.TreeTag join tbl_locations l on l.Location_ID = tt.Location_ID join tlu_PlaceNames pn on pn.ID = l.PlaceNameID where county = 'Swain'

question: Show the count of BOCES_and_N/RC broken down by BOCES_NAME.

question: Make a list of tire models and the number of vehicles with those tires installed where tire damage was observed on at least one tire, as indicated by category values other than 0. Display them from most to least common models. Do not include the unknown damage category value 9.

question: Create a list of species sightings at each station. Include the island, site name, location name, transect and transect type, station, the station's latitude, the event id of the observations, the last names of those who observed as well as their notes, the family, scientific name, common name, and alternate name of each bird observed.
gold_sql: select island, site_name, Loc_Name, transect, transect_type, Station, lat_final, te.event_id, last_name, event_notes, family, Scientific_Name, Common_Name, Alternate_Name from tbl_locations tl join tbl_sites ts on tl.Site_ID = ts.Site_ID join tbl_transect tr on tr.Location_ID = tl.Location_ID join tbl_stations st on st.Transect_ID = tr.Transect_ID join tbl_events te on te.station_id = st.station_id join xref_Event_Contacts ec on ec.Event_ID = te.Event_ID join tlu_Contacts con on ec.Contact_ID = con.Contact_ID join tbl_Observations obs on te.Event_ID = obs.Event_ID join tlu_species spc on obs.Species_ID = spc.Species_ID join xref_Species_Alternate_Names spc_alt on spc.Species_ID = spc_alt.Species_ID
